title: Vasya
summary:
Vasya may refer to:

Vasya (crater), a tiny crater on the Moon
Vasya (film), 2002 American documentary film about artist Vasily Sitnikov
Vassya Bankova (Vasya Bankova; born 1954), a Bulgarian chemist
